font_stack: No existing frontend font stack; introducing Bricolage Grotesque, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono through next/font.
palette: No existing frontend palette; introducing tokenized eco-tech OKLCH palette based on the CEK-B3 green brand brief.
motion: No existing frontend motion layer; introducing framer-motion and react-intersection-observer for restrained reveal and state motion.
spacing: No existing spacing scale; introducing 4px-based CSS custom properties and Tailwind utilities.
framework: No existing app source in frontend; introducing Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
